title: Melody of the Deep negates an attack after a hit

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a magic card or lands a hit. Negate the magic card effect and send it to the cemetery, or negate the attack.

plan.title: Melody of the Deep negates an attack after a hit
plan.summary: After player_1 lands a hit, player_2 plays Melody of the Deep from hand and negates the incoming attack damage.

notes: Put Melody of the Deep in player_2 hand.
Player_1 attacks player_2 creature and lands a hit.

steps: Declare player_1 creature attacks player_2 creature.
Resolve a successful hit and reach the battle response window.
Player_2 plays Melody of the Deep from hand to negate the attack.
manualVerification: Confirm Melody is only playable after the opponent lands a hit, not before the hit result.
riskNotes: The magic-negate branch is covered separately; this fixture covers the attack-negate branch.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
